properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v3 v5 v6 v7 v3 v3 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, what's in man You're mindful of? That even though his soul was lost For him, You bore the only cross that could restore

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You saw my past and knew my shame Yet still You chose to love the same This is the gift You freely gave Immeasurable grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And this is why we sing Your praise Lift high Your precious holy name Oh, Jesus Christ, the Son of God Because of Your love, our debt is paid

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You saw my past and knew my shame Yet still You chose to love the same This is the gift You freely gave Immeasurable grace Immeasurable grace

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Ooh, ooh, ooh Ooh, ooh, ooh Ooh, ooh, ooh Ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh Ooh-ooh Ooh, ooh, ooh Ooh, ooh, ooh Ooh, ooh, ooh Ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And when I see You face-to-face There at the end of all my days Jesus in You, I will remain my dwelling place

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You're my dwelling place In You, I'll remain In You, I'll remain In You, I'll remain

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And this is why we sing Your praise Lift high Your precious holy name Oh, Jesus Christ, the Son of God Because of Your love, our debt is paid (Because of Your love Jesus) Because of Your love, our debt is paid

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Because of Your love, we sing Your praise We sing Your praise, Jesus You are worthy, Lord, You are worthy, Lord
